text: 0 EBS Encryption [P - * Accounts can be set to encrypt by default - default KMS Key ¢ Otherwise choose a KMS Key to use. e Each volume uses 1 unique DEK e Snapshots & future volumes use the same DEK e Can't change a volume to NOT be encrypted ¢ OS isn't aware of the encryption ... no performance loss
